overview.description: The Corgi U.S. Equities 15% Structured Buffer ETF (CMAY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund  is an actively managed ETF, using FLEX options to provide the price return of SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust to a cap while providing a buffer against the first 15% decline on an annual basis. This series begins on May 1 of each year.
